'''Narth''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] evacuated along with [[Ihopek]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gnisnal]]'' was crippled by internal explosions and had to be scuttled. The wreckage later gave the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] the complete copy of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Order of Battle/Legends|Order of battle]].

{{Planet-stub}}
